stemHtml:
A pilot is distracted by a failure of his/her navigation equipment and consequently does not execute a planned turn, but quickly realises and corrects. Afterwards, he/she lands at his/her intermediate airport and checks the weather at his/her final destination. As the weather looks good, he/she decides to take off without loading additional fuel. When he/she encounters an unexpected headwind, he/she lands it to his/her final destination with fuel only for one more landing attempt left. What were the errors committed?

(1) Forgotten turn: lapse
(2) Forgotten turn: violation
(3) Forgotten turn: slip
(4) Forgotten turn: rule-based error
(5) Fuel: knowledge-based error
(6) Fuel: lapse
(7) Fuel: violation
